name: Functional - Analyze Endpoint Returns Structured Response
description: Validates that the /analyze endpoint returns a structured, sectioned, cited comparative analysis of Earth and Jupiter when invoked.
input: POST request to /analyze endpoint with no body (AnalyzeRequest has no fields)
output: AnalyzeResponse with success=True, result containing structured text with headings and citations, error=None, tips=None
success_criteria: response.json()['result'] contains headings and citations (e.g., 'Source: Earth.pdf')
error_scenarios: Azure Search or OpenAI service unavailable
